creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
I've committed a slightly modified form of the submission, in which I
edited the pkg-descr, shortened the port name. and made use of the
existing font code in bsd.xorg.mk.  I also added a pkg-message, to be
on the safe side.  If you have questions about or objections to my
changes, let me know and I'll discuss it with you.  Thanks for the
contribution and sorry about the delay in adding it.

Regards,
                  b.
